content.body: Andreu Botella: that could be better formalized I think
content.formatted_body: Andreu Botella: that could be better formalized I think

content.body: Well, when I'm reading a spec casually I appreciate things like that, rather than having to parse out the meaning of the boilerplate
but here I was trying to figure out whether those were run synchronously when the element is inserted, the attributes changes and so on...
Andreu Botella: file a spec issue :) I'm guessing sync since the spec doesn't say to queue a task or anything, but I'm not sure what is implemented
content.formatted_body: Andreu Botella: file a spec issue :) I'm guessing sync since the spec doesn't say to queue a task or anything, but I'm not sure what is implemented
